'''ngakubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicknamer|nicknamer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicknamer|nicknamer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngakubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækibith|ngækibith]] || [[word:ngækibij|ngækibij]] || [[word:ngækibish|ngækibish]] || [[word:ngækibi|ngækibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakukubuth|ngakukubuth]] || [[word:ngakukubuj|ngakukubuj]] || [[word:ngakukubush|ngakukubush]] || [[word:ngakukubu|ngakukubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakubuth|ngakubuth]] || [[word:ngakubuj|ngakubuj]] || [[word:ngakubush|ngakubush]] || [[word:ngakubu|ngakubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakufbuth|ngakufbuth]] || [[word:ngakufbuj|ngakufbuj]] || [[word:ngakufbush|ngakufbush]] || [[word:ngakufbuf|ngakufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakubuthu|ngakubuthu]] || [[word:ngakubuju|ngakubuju]] || [[word:ngakubushu|ngakubushu]] || [[word:ngakubuku|ngakubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakubuth|ngakubuth]] || [[word:ngakubuj|ngakubuj]] || [[word:ngakubush|ngakubush]] || [[word:ngakubu|ngakubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakubuthul|ngakubuthul]] || [[word:ngakubujul|ngakubujul]] || [[word:ngakubushul|ngakubushul]] || [[word:ngakubukul|ngakubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakubuthuthu|ngakubuthuthu]] || [[word:ngakubujuju|ngakubujuju]] || [[word:ngakubushushu|ngakubushushu]] || [[word:ngakubuku|ngakubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakubuthun|ngakubuthun]] || [[word:ngakubujun|ngakubujun]] || [[word:ngakubushun|ngakubushun]] || [[word:ngakubukun|ngakubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakubuthuoro|ngakubuthuoro]] || [[word:ngakubujuoro|ngakubujuoro]] || [[word:ngakubushuoro|ngakubushuoro]] || [[word:ngakubukuoro|ngakubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
